title: sedum tectorum
intro: Sedum tectorum, also known as the Roof Sedum or Stonecrop, is a perennial succulent plant belonging to the family Crassulaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sedum tectorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Sedum tectorum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or added to skincare products.
